transitions.skip_reason: Planning deliverables are v1-era (C_PKG.* cycles). The v2 redesign (design v2.9) introduced a completely new package structure (contracts/, config/, utils/ submodules, _paths utility, SubRoleRequirementsLoader via DI) that was never formally planned. The planning phase must be re-run to define v2 TDD cycles before implementation can begin.

Design is complete (v2.9, commit de77b28). Planning deliverables define implementation exit criteria (file_exists / contains_text on source files) — these cannot be satisfied at planning time by design. Skipping planning→design and design→implementation sequential validation.

Returning to research to specify correct fixes before continuing documentation.
